capabilities: Ensure result aggregation in security knowledge bases is specialized by applying domain-specific constraints and tools, maintaining error-free and valid results with comprehensive logging.

procedure.action: Execute result aggregation using domain-specific security tools like OpenSCAP; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Execute domain-specific constraints by integrating security policies from CIS Benchmarks; verify compliance with assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.

Log all aggregation operations with timestamps and result codes using a structured logging framework like ELK Stack to ensure traceability and auditability using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assert aggregated results against known security vulnerabilities using CVE databases; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.
Execute continuous monitoring of aggregation processes with Prometheus; alert if operation_duration_ms exceeds 500ms for 5 consecutive operations.

summary: Implement specialized result aggregation for security-focused knowledge bases by applying domain-specific constraints and tools, ensuring error-free and valid results with comprehensive logging.
title: Specialized Result Aggregation in Security Knowledge Bases

failureConditions: Inaccurate results when domain-specific constraints are not applied, causing security policy violations in aggregated data.
Loss of traceability when logging is incomplete, leading to difficulties in auditing and compliance verification.
Increased error rates when domain-specific tools are not used, causing invalid results and potential security breaches.
metrics: aggregated results against known security vulnerabilities using CVE databases
